rows.label: qev085902_MSG0001
rows.name: Oh, so that person's name is Dorothy-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0002
rows.name: She's a beautiful person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0003
rows.name: Well, you know, not really.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0004
rows.name: I don't think this is the place for you to be modest, Shingo-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0005
rows.name: Then Tatsu will go ask her what her favorite food is right away mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0006
rows.name: You don't need to do anything unnecessary![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0007
rows.name: Sigh... But she's so beautiful that a guy like me could never...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0008
rows.name: What can I do to make her happy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev085902_SEL0011
rows.name: Devise a plan to give her a present.

rows.label: qev085902_JNK0020
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: qev085902_SEL0021
rows.name: Recommend confessing without hesitation.

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0009
rows.name:
Eh, a present right out of the blue!?
Shouldn't I invite her out for a meal or something first?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0010
rows.name: Inviting her for a meal is fine, but just a meal won't cut it these days![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0011
rows.name: You need to leave a strong impression with a sudden present![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0012
rows.name: Is that how it works...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0013
rows.name: It might actually not be a bad idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0014
rows.name: She seems to pay close attention to fashion, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0015
rows.name: If you gifted her an accessory like a bracelet during your meal, I imagine she'd be quite happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0016
rows.name: I absolutely think she'd be happy with that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0017
rows.name:
You're right!
I need to be a man about this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0018
rows.name:
Eh, right out of the blue!?
That's impossible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0019
rows.name:
Are you two thinking this through seriously?
No matter how you look at it, that's absurd.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0020
rows.name: I knew it... In that case, would it be safer to invite her out for a meal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0021
rows.name:
You're right.
But is that too ordinary...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0022
rows.name: If so, she seems to pay close attention to fashion...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0023
rows.name: Why don't you gift her an accessory like a bracelet during your meal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0024
rows.name:
That's a great idea!
You could leave a strong impression that way, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0025
rows.name: I see![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0026
rows.name: But how am I supposed to get my hands on a stylish bracelet here on Mira?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0027
rows.name:
Tatsu has a good idea mo!
You should give her a shiny, sparkling stone mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0028
rows.name: Tatsu's Dadapon did that for Mamapon mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0029
rows.name:
Oh, that's brilliant!
You're pretty thoughtful for a Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0030
rows.name: "For a Nopon" is completely unnecessary mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0031
rows.name: Look, how about this mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0032
rows.name: Oh, it's beautiful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0033
rows.name: It is a Nopon matchmaking stone mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0034
rows.name: It is an incredible gift, holding more value than even food mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0035
rows.name: Then let's hurry and go look for that stone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0036
rows.name: Once we find it, we'll need to have someone process it into a bracelet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085902_MSG0037
rows.name: There's a jewelry shop in the Commercial District, so let's try taking it there.[ST:wait ]
